recall_source: Chunk recall: debug.reranked_chunks — full reranker output before RAG_FINAL_CONTEXT_K slice. recall@5 uses top-5, recall@10 uses top-10 from this list. Concept recall: debug.concepts — up to RAG_CONCEPT_TOP_K concepts, de-duped to source-article URLs, ordered by RRF-style rank. Union recall: chunk top-K OR concept URLs.
